headline: ServiceNow (NOW) and IBM Announce Expanded Collaboration
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the best trending AI stocks to watch in 2026. ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) and IBM announced on June 11 an expanded collaboration to address two of the most significant barriers blocking enterprise AI at scale. These include the AI-ready data problem and the legacy application layer. Management stated that the […]

headline: IBM (IBM) Unveils Sub 1 Nanometer Chip And Launches Anderon Quantum Foundry
summary: IBM announced a breakthrough sub-1 nanometer semiconductor chip using a new nanostack architecture, marking what it calls an industry first. The company also unveiled Anderon, a standalone quantum wafer foundry focused on quantum chip manufacturing in the US. These moves aim to advance AI computing hardware and support the buildout of quantum technology infrastructure. For investors watching International Business Machines (NYSE: IBM), these announcements come as the stock trades around...
